phrases.english: stand up for justice; act bravely for a righteous cause
phrases.chinese_explanation: 看见正义的事情，勇敢地去帮助别人。

examples.zh: 林叔叔见义勇为，帮助警察抓住小偷。
examples.en: Uncle Lim bravely helped the police catch the thief.

examples.zh: 他见义勇为，救了一位老人。
examples.en: He bravely rescued an elderly person.

examples.zh: 我们应该学习见义勇为的精神。
examples.en: We should learn the spirit of standing up for justice.

examples.zh: 他因为见义勇为受到大家的表扬。
examples.en: He was praised by everyone for his bravery.

examples.zh: 见义勇为是值得我们学习的美德。
examples.en: Standing up for justice is a virtue worth learning.

phrases.english: as fast as lightning; extremely fast
phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容速度非常快，像风和闪电一样迅速。

examples.zh: 警车风驰电掣地赶到现场。
examples.en: The police car arrived at the scene extremely quickly.

examples.zh: 救护车风驰电掣地开来。
examples.en: The ambulance came speeding like lightning.

examples.zh: 他风驰电掣地跑向终点。
examples.en: He ran towards the finish line at great speed.

examples.zh: 消防车风驰电掣地赶往火场。
examples.en: The fire engine rushed to the fire scene at lightning speed.

examples.zh: 小狗风驰电掣地追着球跑。
examples.en: The puppy chased the ball very quickly.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 举动和神色令人怀疑。

examples.zh: 那名男子形迹可疑，我们要小心。
examples.en: That man looks suspicious, so we must be careful.

examples.zh: 保安发现一个形迹可疑的人在商场里徘徊。
examples.en: The security guard noticed a suspicious person wandering in the mall.

examples.zh: 警察一直观察那个形迹可疑的男子。
examples.en: The police kept watching the suspicious man.

examples.zh: 他东张西望，形迹可疑。
examples.en: He kept looking around and appeared suspicious.

examples.zh: 老师发现校门外有一个形迹可疑的陌生人。
examples.en: The teacher saw a suspicious stranger outside the school gate.

phrases.english: terrified; scared out of one's wits
phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容非常害怕，惊恐万分。

examples.zh: 小偷看到警察，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: The thief was terrified when he saw the police.

examples.zh: 她听到巨响，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: She was scared out of her wits by the loud noise.

examples.zh: 孩子差点被车撞到，妈妈吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: The mother was terrified when her child almost got hit by a car.

examples.zh: 地震发生时，人们吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: People were terrified when the earthquake happened.

examples.zh: 他差点跌下楼梯，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: He was frightened out of his wits when he almost fell down the stairs.

phrases.english: run away immediately; take to one's heels
phrases.chinese_explanation: 马上跑开，形容动作很快。

examples.zh: 小偷抢了包后，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The thief ran away immediately after snatching the bag.

examples.zh: 小猫看到大狗，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The kitten ran away immediately when it saw the big dog.

examples.zh: 听见雷声，他拔腿就跑回家。
examples.en: He ran home immediately after hearing the thunder.

examples.zh: 学生快迟到了，拔腿就跑进教室。
examples.en: The student ran into the classroom quickly because he was almost late.

examples.zh: 老鼠看到猫，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The mouse ran away immediately when it saw the cat.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容举动偷偷摸摸，不光明正大。

examples.zh: 那个人贼头贼脑，看起来不像好人。
examples.en: That person looked sneaky and did not seem like a good person.

examples.zh: 他一直东张西望，贼头贼脑。
examples.en: He kept looking around sneakily.

examples.zh: 保安注意到一个贼头贼脑的人。
examples.en: The security guard noticed a sneaky person.

examples.zh: 小偷贼头贼脑地靠近那位女士。
examples.en: The thief sneaked towards the lady.

examples.zh: 他鬼鬼祟祟，贼头贼脑，令人怀疑。
examples.en: He acted sneakily and suspiciously.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 眼睛一动不动地看，形容非常专心。

examples.zh: 小朋友目不转睛地看魔术表演。
examples.en: The children watched the magic show attentively.

examples.zh: 全班同学目不转睛地看着老师做实验。
examples.en: The whole class watched the teacher do the experiment attentively.

examples.zh: 我目不转睛地看着精彩的比赛。
examples.en: I watched the exciting match without taking my eyes off it.

examples.zh: 妹妹目不转睛地看动画片。
examples.en: My younger sister stared at the cartoon attentively.

examples.zh: 大家目不转睛地看着美丽的烟花。
examples.en: Everyone watched the beautiful fireworks attentively.

phrases.english: break the law; violate the law
phrases.chinese_explanation: 做违法的事情。

examples.zh: 小偷偷东西，已经触犯法律。
examples.en: The thief broke the law by stealing.

examples.zh: 每个人都不能触犯法律。
examples.en: No one should break the law.

examples.zh: 酒后驾驶会触犯法律。
examples.en: Drunk driving breaks the law.

examples.zh: 偷东西是触犯法律的行为。
examples.en: Stealing is an act that violates the law.

examples.zh: 我们要遵守法律，不要触犯法律。
examples.en: We must obey the law and not break it.

phrases.english: come to someone’s aid; help bravely
phrases.chinese_explanation: 看见别人有困难或受欺负时，主动帮助。

examples.zh: 林叔叔拔刀相助，帮女士追回了包。
examples.en: Uncle Lim came to the lady’s aid and helped recover her bag.

examples.zh: 路人拔刀相助，救了受伤的孩子。
examples.en: A passer-by came forward to help the injured child.

examples.zh: 同学跌倒时，他马上拔刀相助。
examples.en: He immediately helped when his classmate fell down.

examples.zh: 我们要学习拔刀相助的精神。
examples.en: We should learn the spirit of helping others bravely.

examples.zh: 他拔刀相助，因此受到大家感谢。
examples.en: He helped bravely and was thanked by everyone.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 肩膀几乎碰到肩膀地经过；也可指错过机会。

examples.zh: 小偷和女士擦肩而过时，抢走了她的包。
examples.en: The thief snatched the lady’s bag as he brushed past her.

examples.zh: 我们在人群中擦肩而过，却没有发现彼此。
examples.en: We brushed past each other in the crowd without noticing.

examples.zh: 他与好机会擦肩而过，感到很可惜。
examples.en: He missed a good opportunity and felt regretful.

examples.zh: 两辆车擦肩而过，十分危险。
examples.en: The two cars passed very close to each other, which was dangerous.

examples.zh: 我差一点就和老师擦肩而过。
examples.en: I almost brushed past my teacher.

phrases.english: lost and found again; recovered after being lost
phrases.chinese_explanation: 失去后又重新得到。

examples.zh: 钱包失而复得，女士非常高兴。
examples.en: The lady was very happy when her lost wallet was recovered.

examples.zh: 我的手机失而复得，真是太幸运了。
examples.en: My lost phone was found again; I was very lucky.

examples.zh: 书本失而复得后，我松了一口气。
examples.en: I breathed a sigh of relief after my lost book was found.

examples.zh: 小狗失而复得，全家人都很开心。
examples.en: The whole family was happy when the lost puppy was found again.

examples.zh: 证件终于失而复得，他喜出望外。
examples.en: He was pleasantly surprised when his lost document was recovered.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 偷偷或很快地逃跑。

examples.zh: 小偷抢了包后，想逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The thief wanted to run away after snatching the bag.

examples.zh: 狐狸看到猎人，立刻逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The fox ran away immediately when it saw the hunter.

examples.zh: 看见老师走来，他逃之夭夭。
examples.en: He ran away when he saw the teacher coming.

examples.zh: 骗子骗了钱后逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The cheat ran away after taking the money.

examples.zh: 犯人想逃之夭夭，却被警察抓住了。
examples.en: The criminal tried to escape but was caught by the police.

phrases.english: completely empty; not a single person
phrases.chinese_explanation: 一个人也没有。

examples.zh: 放学后，教室里空无一人。
examples.en: After school, there was no one in the classroom.

examples.zh: 比赛结束后，操场空无一人。
examples.en: After the match, the field was completely empty.

examples.zh: 清晨的公园空无一人。
examples.en: The park was empty in the early morning.

examples.zh: 商店关门后，里面空无一人。
examples.en: After the shop closed, there was no one inside.

examples.zh: 深夜的街道空无一人。
examples.en: The street was empty late at night.

phrases.english: surrender without resistance; be caught without struggle
phrases.chinese_explanation: 不反抗，乖乖地被抓住。

examples.zh: 小偷被警察包围，只好束手就擒。
examples.en: The thief was surrounded by the police and had to surrender.

examples.zh: 犯人终于束手就擒。
examples.en: The criminal finally surrendered.

examples.zh: 警察赶到后，坏人束手就擒。
examples.en: After the police arrived, the bad guy gave himself up.

examples.zh: 小偷知道跑不了，只好束手就擒。
examples.en: The thief knew he could not escape and had to surrender.

examples.zh: 在大家的帮助下，抢匪最终束手就擒。
examples.en: With everyone’s help, the robber was finally caught.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 聪明灵活，又有勇气。

examples.zh: 小乐机智勇敢，帮助阿姨抓住了小偷。
examples.en: Xiaole was clever and brave, helping the auntie catch the thief.

examples.zh: 她机智勇敢地救了妹妹。
examples.en: She cleverly and bravely saved her younger sister.

examples.zh: 消防员机智勇敢，救出了被困的人。
examples.en: The firefighters were clever and brave and rescued the trapped people.

examples.zh: 他机智勇敢地报警。
examples.en: He cleverly and bravely called the police.

examples.zh: 我们要做一个机智勇敢的孩子。
examples.en: We should be clever and brave children.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 四处看，常表示不专心或可疑。

examples.zh: 小偷东张西望，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was look around, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“东张西望”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “东张西望” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“东张西望”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “东张西望”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“东张西望”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “东张西望” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“东张西望”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “东张西望” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 好像没有发生任何事一样。

examples.zh: 小偷若无其事，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was as if nothing happened, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“若无其事”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “若无其事” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“若无其事”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “若无其事”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“若无其事”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “若无其事” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“若无其事”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “若无其事” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容事情做得很隐秘，没有人知道。

examples.zh: 小偷神不知，鬼不觉，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was without anyone noticing, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“神不知，鬼不觉”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “神不知，鬼不觉” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“神不知，鬼不觉”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “神不知，鬼不觉”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“神不知，鬼不觉”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “神不知，鬼不觉” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“神不知，鬼不觉”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “神不知，鬼不觉” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 放轻脚步走路，怕被人发现或打扰别人。

examples.zh: 小偷蹑手蹑脚，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was tiptoe quietly, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“蹑手蹑脚”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “蹑手蹑脚” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“蹑手蹑脚”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “蹑手蹑脚”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“蹑手蹑脚”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “蹑手蹑脚” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“蹑手蹑脚”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “蹑手蹑脚” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容女子受到惊吓，脸色大变。

examples.zh: 小偷花容失色，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was turn pale with fear, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“花容失色”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “花容失色” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“花容失色”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “花容失色”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“花容失色”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “花容失色” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“花容失色”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “花容失色” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 非常慌张，不知道该怎么办。

examples.zh: 小偷惊慌失措，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was panic and lose composure, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“惊慌失措”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “惊慌失措” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“惊慌失措”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “惊慌失措”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“惊慌失措”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “惊慌失措” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“惊慌失措”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “惊慌失措” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 一点也不迟疑，马上去做。

examples.zh: 小偷毫不犹豫，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was without hesitation, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“毫不犹豫”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “毫不犹豫” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“毫不犹豫”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “毫不犹豫”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“毫不犹豫”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “毫不犹豫” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“毫不犹豫”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “毫不犹豫” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容走得很快，很着急。

examples.zh: 小偷三步并作两步，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was rush forward quickly, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“三步并作两步”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “三步并作两步” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“三步并作两步”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “三步并作两步”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“三步并作两步”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “三步并作两步” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“三步并作两步”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “三步并作两步” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 形容用了很大的力气。

examples.zh: 小偷九牛二虎之力，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was great effort, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“九牛二虎之力”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “九牛二虎之力” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“九牛二虎之力”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “九牛二虎之力”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“九牛二虎之力”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “九牛二虎之力” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“九牛二虎之力”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “九牛二虎之力” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 表示称赞或赞同。

examples.zh: 小偷竖起大拇指，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was give a thumbs up, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“竖起大拇指”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “竖起大拇指” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“竖起大拇指”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “竖起大拇指”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“竖起大拇指”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “竖起大拇指” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“竖起大拇指”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “竖起大拇指” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 非常激动。

examples.zh: 小偷激动万分，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was extremely excited, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“激动万分”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “激动万分” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“激动万分”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “激动万分”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“激动万分”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “激动万分” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“激动万分”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “激动万分” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 遇到困难或危险时勇敢站出来。

examples.zh: 小偷挺身而出，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was step forward bravely, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“挺身而出”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “挺身而出” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“挺身而出”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “挺身而出”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“挺身而出”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “挺身而出” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“挺身而出”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “挺身而出” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 热情地帮助别人。

examples.zh: 小偷热心助人，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was warm-hearted and helpful, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“热心助人”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “热心助人” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“热心助人”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “热心助人”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“热心助人”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “热心助人” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“热心助人”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “热心助人” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 喜欢帮助别人。

examples.zh: 小偷乐于助人，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was willing to help others, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“乐于助人”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “乐于助人” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“乐于助人”这个词。
examples.en: Seeing this scene, everyone thought of the phrase “乐于助人”.

examples.zh: 老师提醒我们要正确使用“乐于助人”。
examples.en: The teacher reminded us to use “乐于助人” correctly.

examples.zh: 他在口试中用“乐于助人”来描述事情的经过。
examples.en: He used “乐于助人” in the oral exam to describe what happened.

phrases.chinese_explanation: 遇到危险也不害怕。

examples.zh: 小偷临危不惧，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was stay calm in danger, which made people suspicious.

examples.zh: 作文中用上“临危不惧”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “临危不惧” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.
